However, reports suggest PSG and other clubs may make a stronger push for him this summer. arts.ttl: Man Utd Willing to Sell Napoli Target Who Could Be Used in Potential Move for PSG-Linked Attacker
arts.sum: This month, journalist Laurie Whitwell noted that Manchester United haven’t ruled out including Alejandro Garnacho in their bid to secure Paris Saint-Germain transfer target Victor Osimhen. On the Inside United podcast, Whitwell shared that Manchester United are keen on bringing Osimhen to Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Daily Mail Reveals How Much PSG Want From Aston Villa for Marco Asensio
arts.sum: Marco Asensio has hit the ground running with Aston Villa, racking up seven goals in eight games for the Premier League club.
